name: Urban Racer
author: Poki
description: Urban Racer is an open-world driving adventure where the city is your playground! Speed through busy downtown streets, drift along sandy beaches, and race past lively shopping districts as you take on thrilling missions. Unlock unique cars, explore every corner, and experience the ultimate driving freedom. Are you ready to rule the roads? How to play Urban Racer? Speed Up: W or the up arrow key Brake: S or the down arrow key Turn left and right: A/D or left and right arrow keys Who created Urban Racer? Urban Racer is created by CAMU. Play their other game on Poki: Lucky Claw Machine , Fox Island Builder and Power Wash Cleanup ! How can I play Urban Racer for free? You can play Urban Racer for free on Poki. Can I play Urban Racer on mobile devices and desktop? Urban Racer can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
